subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Clear section labeling with logical introductionâmethodologyâanalysisâconclusion structure
Wellâformatted tables and figures placed immediately after reference (e.g., Table 2)
Overall pattern of argument is identifiable despite digressions
weaknesses: Frequent narrative digressions and personal anecdotes dilute focus
Repetitive descriptive text and long raw tables reduce conciseness
Abrupt transitions between paragraphs hamper smooth logical development
Bibliography contains duplicated entries and inconsistent formatting
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exploration demonstrates some coherence and a clear overall structure (organization at band 3) but is weakened by digressions, unnecessary detail and repetition (coherence and relevance at band 2). Averaging the strand assessments yields a band 2 performance overall, meriting 2 marks.

strengths: Standard formulas (mean, percentage, regression) are stated with appropriate symbols and subscripts
Effective use of multiple representations (tables, bar charts, map, line plots, boxplots)
Explanations are generally understandable and the reader can follow key mathematical steps
weaknesses: Minor typographical and notation errors (missing degree symbol, inconsistent use of superscripts)
Confusing units in tables (minutes vs hours) and lack of formal outlier criteria
Occasional misâcopied numbers and unclear timeâconversion steps reduce overall consistency
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Mathematical language and notation are mostly appropriate, multiple representations are used effectively, and communication is generally clear with some inconsistencies. The strand assessments of 3, 3 and 2 average to a band 3 performance, supporting 3 marks.

strengths: Authentic personal motivation demonstrated through lifelong running anecdotes
Clear personal approach in selecting relevant variables and reflecting on application to future races
Significant initiative shown in primary data collection and multiâvariable regression modelling
weaknesses: Narrative occasionally drifts into generic commentary rather than deep personal insight
Creativity and initiative are moderate; methodological novelty is present but not outstanding
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Each strand of independent thinking, personal approach and creativity is assessed at band 2. The exploration shows significant but not outstanding personal engagement, meriting 2 marks.

strengths: Meaningful reflection linking statistical results to training strategies and race organisation
Discussion of coefficients and limitations shows some critique
Clear connection between numerical findings and understanding of athlete performance
weaknesses: Reflection remains largely descriptive rather than deeply critical
Key model assumptions (linearity, homoscedasticity, normality) are not examined
Omission of humidity in analysis vs conclusion highlights coherence issues
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection, critical analysis and connection to understanding are all consistently at band 2. While meaningful reflection is present, it lacks depth and critical rigour, warranting 2 marks.

strengths: Relevant SLâlevel mathematics (percentages, boxplots, multiple regression) is used effectively
Calculations are mostly correct and the regression model is applied clearly to prediction tasks
Sound understanding of statistical concepts with clear explanations of model outputs
weaknesses: Minor calculation slips (mean temperature misâentry, time conversions) and data grouping inconsistencies
Intermediate steps (e.g., RÂ²âðð derivation) are not fully shown
Some sophistication (e.g., deeper exploration of regression diagnostics) is absent
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While the work fits band 3 in relevance, accuracy and understanding, the effective and coherent application of course-level mathematicsâespecially the clear use of regression for realâworld predictionâdemonstrates performance approaching band 4. To reflect the strong, mostly correct and purpose-driven use of mathematics, this criterion is awarded 4 marks.

strandSelections.reasoning: Choosing cities, scraping data and constructing a regression model illustrate noticeable initiative beyond simply re-using textbook data, indicating âsignificant evidence of independent thinking,â but not at an outstanding level.

The student demonstrates a sound grasp of mean, percentage, regression coefficients and interpretation, but explanations occasionally lack precision (e.g., constant term meaning).  Overall there is âgood understanding in parts,â but not thorough sophistication.

Calculations are generally sensible; however, minor slips (temperature mean mis-entry, inconsistent time conversions) appear.  This aligns with âmathematics mostly correct,â meriting the middle band.

The student includes substantial descriptive text that does not advance the mathematical investigation (e.g., climate summaries, reiteration of table contents), and some explanations are verbose.  Overall relevance is acceptable but there is noticeable extraneous material; thus the work is âmostly relevant with some unnecessary elements.â

Mean, percentage and regression formulas are stated using standard symbols and appropriate subscripts; variables are generally defined.  Minor typographical issues (superscript errors, missing degree symbol) prevent the highest band, but language and notation are âmostly appropriate throughout.â

Most explanations are understandable, but inconsistent units (minutes vs hours), occasional mis-copied numbers and some confusing sentences reduce overall clarity.  Communication is therefore âmostly clear with some consistency.â

Percentages, means, boxplots and a multiple linear regression are all at SL course level and clearly relevant to the question.  The work uses them adequately but without any advanced extensions, so it fits ârelevant mathematics at course level used.â

The exploration employs multiple tables, bar charts, a map, line plots and a box-and-whisker diagram that together support the discussion.  Representations are correctly labelled and interpreted, constituting âeffective use of multiple mathematical representations,â though not especially sophisticated.

The student comments on how age, gender and weather influence performance, and links numerical results to physiological explanations.  Reflection is present at several points, but remains descriptive rather than deeply critical, representing âmeaningful reflection throughout.â

Collecting primary datasets, creating custom graphs and attempting multi-variable regression display âsignificant creativity and initiative,â but methodological novelty and depth are moderate rather than exceptional.

The narrative follows an introductionâmethodologyâanalysisâconclusion pattern, but there are frequent digressions (e.g., long personal anecdotes, duplicated city descriptions) and several logical jumps between paragraphs.  Consequently, the overall line of argument is only partially smooth and suffers from repetition, fitting the description of âsome coherence and logical development.â

The discussion of coefficients, RÂ² and potential limitations shows âmeaningful analysis with some critique,â yet stops short of probing model assumptions (e.g., linearity, multicollinearity) or data reliability in depth.

Connections between statistical findings and improved training or race organisation are explicitly drawn, evidencing a âclear connection to understanding,â but the enhancement of mathematical understanding is not strongly articulated.

Sections are clearly labelled, tables/figures are placed after being referenced, and the reader can follow the progression from data collection to results.  While transitions are occasionally abrupt, an introduction, body (methodology + analysis) and conclusion are evident, meeting the requirement for a âwell-organizedâ report.

The studentâs lifelong interest in running, selection of personally relevant variables and reflections on applying findings to future races show a âclear personal approach that drives the exploration,â though the narrative sometimes drifts into generic commentary.

annotations.comment: Strong personal engagement is evident through lifelong running anecdotes, demonstrating authentic interest and initiative in the exploration.
The methodology section outlines data sources but lacks detail on webâscraping validation. Explain how you ensured scraped data were accurate and cleaned before analysis.
The extensive raw frequency tables on one page reduce clarity. Consider summarizing counts with a combined table or graphical representation to enhance readability.
The map effectively illustrates global city locations and weather metrics, aiding geographic context. A legend for symbols and units would further improve comprehension.

The introduction provides personal motivation but meanders with anecdotes, diluting focus. Tighten the narrative by clearly stating the research question at the start and reducing nonâmathematical commentary.
The research question is embedded across sentences and cities. Reformat it as a standalone question to improve clarity and ensure the reader immediately grasps the aim.
The table lists weather conditions âin hours, minutes, and seconds,â which is incorrect. Use appropriate units (e.g., Â°C for temperature, % or km/h for wind).
When introducing variables (M and K), define coding explicitly and link back to the research question. This strengthens mathematical communication and consistency.
Table 2 is clear and well formatted, providing a concrete example of the raw data collected in ÅÃ³dÅº. This supports transparency in data handling.
In Table 4, the age category â40â appears twice, which suggests inconsistent data grouping. Verify and consolidate age bins to prevent duplication.
Calculation of $R^2_{adj}$ is correct in result but the intermediate fraction should be evaluated precisely. Show numeric substitution and simplify to 0.514 to justify 0.486.
Interpretation lists coefficients but fails to discuss units: age coefficient is in seconds per year, temperature coefficient also seconds per Â°C. Clarify units to improve mathematical accuracy.
In the fiveânumber summary table, the âCombinedâ row is useful. However, it would be more concise to plot only quartiles in a single comparative boxplot rather than raw table values.
The discussion connects statistical findings to training strategies, demonstrating thoughtful reflection on how results apply to athletes and organizers.
Temperature bullet points use plain text â10Â°Câ instead of LaTeX. Use proper notation such as $$10^{\circ}\text{C}$$ for consistency.
The mean temperature calculation mistakenly sums 7 instead of 17. Ensure data values and sums match your descriptive text.
Time conversions in marathon finish time calculation are unclear. Show the step converting seconds to decimal minutes explicitly to avoid misinterpretation.
The regression summary omits a discussion of model assumptions (linearity, homoscedasticity, normality of residuals). Include a critique of these to deepen analysis.
The predicted time examples are clear and demonstrate application of the model. They enhance understanding of how to use regression outputs in context.
The narrative identifies Londonâs (should be Dublinâs) Q3 as an outlier without formal detection criteria. Specify the rule (e.g., 1.5ÃIQR) to substantiate outlier claims.
The conclusion highlights humidity effects yet humidity was excluded from the regression. Either include it in analysis or explain why it was omitted to strengthen coherence.
The bibliography includes repeated entries and lacks Harvardâstyle uniformity. Consolidate duplicates (e.g., Canadian Running Magazine) and format consistently.
Consider adding a short section reflecting on limitations such as sample representativeness, potential bias in scraped data, and model generalizability for deeper critical analysis.
